about.title: Coldnb – Offering rare and beautiful items worldwide
about.introText: Welcome to Coldnb, your premier destination for fashion-forward clothing and accessories. We pride ourselves on offering a curated selection of rare and beautiful items sourced both locally and globally. Our mission is to bring you the latest trends and timeless styles, ensuring every piece reflects quality and elegance. Discover the perfect addition to your wardrobe at Coldnb.
about.visionText: At Coldnb, we envision a world where high-quality fashion is accessible to everyone. We strive to democratize access to exclusive pieces, connecting talented artisans to discerning customers around the world.
about.whatSetsUsApartText: What sets us apart is our commitment to exceptional quality and careful curation. Every piece in our collection is personally selected, ensuring it meets the highest standards of craftsmanship and design.
about.commitmentText: We are committed to sustainable and responsible practices. We work with suppliers who share our values of ethical production, fair trade, and respect for the environment.

faq.q13: The items received are incorrect or are defective. What should I do?

faq.q15: In which countries can I shop online?
faq.faqAnswer: Our delivery partners have adapted their procedures to ensure the safety of our employees and community. We thank you for your patience, as there may be some delays to deliveries. We remind you that you can still find us at coldnb.com.br and on all our online channels. Our customer services team is still here for you, to answer any questions you may have, although due to the current situation, we are operating with longer waiting times.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introText: Cold n' B. ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and share your information when you use our website and services, in accordance with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD - Law No. 13,709/2018).
privacy.dataCollectedText: We collect the following personal data when you interact with our website:
privacy.dataCollectedItems: Name and surname;Email address;Phone number;Shipping address (street, city, state, postal code);Payment information (processed securely by Stripe — we do not store card numbers);Order history and preferences;IP address and browsing data (via cookies);Newsletter subscription preferences
privacy.purposeText: Your personal data is used for the following purposes:
privacy.purposeItems: Processing and delivering your orders;Sending order confirmations and status updates;Providing customer support;Sending marketing communications (only with your consent);Improving our website and services;Complying with legal obligations
privacy.legalBasisText: We process your data based on: your consent (e.g., newsletter subscription, cookies); contractual necessity (e.g., order processing and delivery); legitimate interest (e.g., fraud prevention, website improvement); and legal obligation (e.g., tax and accounting records).
privacy.sharingText: We may share your personal data with trusted third-party service providers strictly for operational purposes: Stripe (payment processing), Brevo (transactional and marketing emails), Supabase (authentication), and shipping carriers (order delivery). We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.cookiesText: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, remember your preferences, and analyze site traffic. You can manage cookie preferences through the cookie consent banner or your browser settings. Essential cookies (required for site functionality) cannot be disabled.
privacy.retentionText: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, or as required by law. Order data is retained for the legally required period for tax and accounting purposes. You may request deletion of your account and personal data at any time.
privacy.rightsText: Under the LGPD, you have the right to:
privacy.rightsItems: Confirm whether we process your personal data;Access your personal data;Correct incomplete or outdated data;Request anonymization, blocking, or deletion of unnecessary data;Request data portability;Revoke consent at any time;Request deletion of data processed with your consent;Obtain information about entities with whom we share your data
privacy.securityText: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data, including encryption (SSL/TLS), secure password hashing (Argon2id), access controls, and regular security monitoring.
privacy.contactText: For questions about this Privacy Policy or to exercise your data protection rights, please contact us through our contact page or by email.
privacy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this page periodically.

unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe
unsubscribe.successMessage: You will no longer receive marketing emails from us. If this was a mistake, you can always subscribe again from our website.
unsubscribe.errorMessage: The unsubscribe link may be invalid or expired. You can also unsubscribe by contacting us.
unsubscribe.invalidLinkMessage: This link appears to be incomplete. Please use the full link from your email.
